provider: process environment and Electron packaging state

RendererTrust.sourceSignature: export type RendererTrust = | { mode: 'development'; origin: string } | { mode: 'production'; url: string };

DfuToolConfiguration.sourceSignature: export interface ApplicationConfig { readonly developmentServerUrl?: URL; readonly dfuUtilPath?: string; readonly executableSearchPath: string; }

invocations.inputDescription: Process environment and authoritative Electron packaging state.
invocations.outputDescription: One normalized ApplicationConfig for renderer location and dfu-util discovery.

errors.description: The supported environment shape, development URL, or explicit absolute dfu-util path is invalid.

invariants: An explicit dfu-util override is retained only as an absolute path and never bypasses exact version admission.
invocations.validationBoundary: src/main/config.ts#loadApplicationConfig.loadApplicationConfig owns the exact declared call boundary; referenced runtime validators apply before untrusted values are used.

invocations.outputDescription: The exact admitted loopback HTTP URL.

errors.description: The configured development URL is not unauthenticated local HTTP.

invariants: Only unauthenticated HTTP URLs on localhost, 127.0.0.1, or [::1] are admitted.
invocations.validationBoundary: src/main/security.ts#validateDevelopmentServerUrl.validateDevelopmentServerUrl owns the exact declared call boundary; referenced runtime validators apply before untrusted values are used.

invocations.sourceSignature: selectDevelopmentServerUrl(value: string | undefined, isPackaged: boolean): URL | undefined
invocations.inputDescription: Optional development URL plus authoritative packaging state.
invocations.outputDescription: The admitted development URL, or absence for packaged/file rendering.

errors.description: The configured development URL is not unauthenticated local HTTP.

invariants: Packaged applications and absent values return undefined without parsing the override.
An unpackaged nonempty value is accepted only through validateDevelopmentServerUrl.
invocations.validationBoundary: src/main/security.ts#selectDevelopmentServerUrl.selectDevelopmentServerUrl owns the exact declared call boundary; referenced runtime validators apply before untrusted values are used.

invocations.sourceSignature: isTrustedRendererUrl(actual: string, expected: RendererTrust | undefined): boolean
invocations.inputDescription: Actual frame URL and the exact expected renderer trust variant.
invocations.outputDescription: Whether the frame URL exactly satisfies the selected trust boundary.
invariants: Undefined expectations and malformed actual URLs return false.
Development trust requires exact origin equality; production trust requires exact URL equality.
invocations.validationBoundary: src/main/security.ts#isTrustedRendererUrl.isTrustedRendererUrl owns the exact declared call boundary; referenced runtime validators apply before untrusted values are used.
